LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO CLAIMANT CAMILLA BINGCANG REIMER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, E-MAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.ORG (L&M302)
ORDER AFTER HEARING RE: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO CLAIMANT CAMILLA BINGCANG REIMER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RE: SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AGAINST CLAIMANT CAMILLA BINGCANG REIMER. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT $19,050.00 IS FORFEITED TO THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA PURSUANT TO HEALTY AND SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 11470,ET SEQ., AS TO CLAIMANT CAMILLA BINGCANG REIMER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-26-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO CLAIMANT PATRICK LAGMAY REIMER FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO CLAIMANT PATRICK LAGMAY REIMER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $947.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT CAMILLA BINGCANG. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,787.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment As To Claimant Camilla Bingcang Reimer
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Amy Sheareer of the San Francisco District Attorney's Office (415-553-9706) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Claimant Camilla Bingcang Reimer is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Written order and judgment are signed and filed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
